77 Pouches is a Polish nicotine pouch brand offering one of the widest flavour selections in the high-strength category. Manufactured by Luna Corporate, the range spans mini and slim formats with strengths from 10.4 mg to a hefty 20 mg per pouch. What sets 77 apart is variety — with flavours covering mint, berry, cola, licorice, and tropical fruit, there's always something new to try. The affordable price point and EU-based production make 77 Pouches a popular gateway into the stronger end of the nicotine pouch market. If you want to explore bold flavours without paying premium prices, 77 delivers.

ACE is a Swedish nicotine pouch brand offering a well-balanced range from gentle 3 mg to extra-strong 11.5 mg in slim format. With 8 products covering berry, fruit, and mint flavours, ACE is known for clean, straightforward taste profiles and comfortable pouches. The brand bridges the gap between beginner-friendly options and serious-strength products, making it a solid daily driver for users who want quality without complexity.

Après is a Stockholm-based premium nicotine pouch brand that merges Scandinavian design sensibility with a lifestyle-first approach. Crafted in Vetlanda, Sweden, Après uses plant-based materials and eco-conscious packaging to appeal to the design-savvy consumer. Available in slim format from 4 mg to 11 mg, the brand covers mild through extra-strong territory with sophisticated flavour profiles — think refined citrus, mixed berries, and cool mint rather than candy-shop novelty. The minimalist can design and premium positioning make Après the brand of choice for adults who see their nicotine pouch as an extension of personal style.

AVANT offers strong-to-extra-strong slim pouches from 7.8 mg to 13 mg in berry, fruit, and mint flavours. With 6 products, the brand targets the serious user who wants quality pouches in the upper-mid strength range — strong enough to satisfy but not extreme.
BRUTE offers a strong citrus slim pouch at 9.5 mg. A single-product brand that delivers exactly what its name promises — a bold, no-nonsense citrus experience.

Chainpop offers a versatile range of slim nicotine pouches from 5 mg to 11.4 mg, covering normal through extra-strong. With 9 products in berry, fruit, and mint flavours, Chainpop delivers solid everyday options at a competitive price. A reliable choice for users who want variety without premium pricing.

CLEW is a nicotine pouch brand offering a well-balanced range from nicotine-free up to ultra-strong (20 mg) in slim format. With 20 products covering mint, berry, coffee, and fruit flavours, CLEW strikes a middle ground between the premium Swedish brands and the high-strength Polish ones. The brand is known for smooth flavour delivery and comfortable pouch design, making it a reliable everyday choice. Whether you prefer a gentle coffee pouch for the morning or a powerful mint for the afternoon, CLEW's range has the versatility to match your mood throughout the day.

CUBA is a Polish nicotine pouch brand from Nicotobacco, built for one purpose: power. With strengths starting at 10.4 mg and climbing to an intense 43 mg per pouch, CUBA is not for beginners. The brand has carved out a dedicated niche among experienced users who find mainstream strengths insufficient. Available exclusively in slim format, CUBA packs its pouches with bold flavours — from fruity mango and watermelon to icy mint and classic cola. The Black Line pushes into ultra-strong territory, while the standard range offers a (relatively) more moderate experience. CUBA is the brand you graduate to when nothing else hits hard enough.

DENSSI is a nicotine pouch brand positioned in the mild-to-medium strength range, with products from 4 mg to 8 mg. Available in slim format with 14 products covering berry, fruit, and mint flavours, DENSSI is designed for users who want a comfortable, smooth daily experience without extreme nicotine levels. The brand is a natural fit for beginners stepping up from nicotine-free options or regular users who prefer a gentler pouch for all-day use. DENSSI keeps it clean, simple, and accessible.

DOSH packs impressive flavour variety into its 6-product range — berry, citrus, cola, fruit, and mint all in the normal-to-strong bracket (6-9 mg). Available in slim format, DOSH lets you explore five different flavour families without changing strength. A great brand for flavour explorers who like their pouches in the comfortable mid-range.

Fix offers a balanced range of slim pouches from 5.6 mg to 11.5 mg across berry, fruit, and mint flavours. With 6 products spanning normal to extra-strong, Fix provides straightforward, reliable options for everyday use. No gimmicks — just well-made pouches at reasonable strength levels.

FOLD takes a focused approach with exclusively berry-flavoured slim pouches across three strengths — normal (6 mg), strong (9 mg), and extra-strong (13 mg). With 4 products, FOLD is the brand for berry devotees who want their favourite flavour at exactly the right intensity.

FUMI is a Swedish nicotine pouch brand from Helix Sweden, manufactured in Ödeshög with a focus on natural, plant-based ingredients. Launched around 2021, FUMI positions itself as the eco-conscious choice for discerning pouch users. Available in slim format from 8 mg to 11 mg, the brand emphasises a soft, comfortable fit and long-lasting flavour — claiming up to 45 minutes of taste per pouch. The range includes berry, fruit, licorice, and mint varieties, all crafted with attention to ingredient quality. FUMI appeals to users who care about what goes into their pouches as much as what comes out of the experience.

Garant is a nicotine pouch brand that operates exclusively in the high-strength bracket, with products ranging from 15 mg to an intense 38 mg per pouch. Available in slim format with an impressive variety of flavours — berry, citrus, cola, fruit, licorice, and mint — Garant offers something for every taste preference at serious nicotine levels. The brand fills a valuable niche: high-quality, flavourful pouches for experienced users who need more than 12 mg to feel satisfied. With 15 products in the range, Garant proves that strength and flavour variety don't have to be mutually exclusive.

GLICK is a nicotine pouch brand offering one of the broadest strength ranges available — from a gentle 4 mg all the way to an intense 25 mg ultra-strong. Available in slim format with 11 products covering berry, citrus, and mint, GLICK lets you explore different strength levels within a single brand. Whether you're starting mild and curious about stronger options, or you want the flexibility to choose your intensity based on the moment, GLICK has the range to accommodate.

HELWIT is a Swedish nicotine pouch brand from Småland, crafted for users who prefer a gentler, more refined experience. Manufactured in Gränshöm, Sweden, HELWIT focuses on mild-to-medium strengths from 3.5 mg to 7.5 mg — making it one of the best choices for beginners and those who don't need an intense nicotine hit. The slim pouches are designed for comfort, with a soft texture and natural flavour profiles that include everything from classic mint and coffee to cola and licorice. HELWIT proves that quality doesn't require extreme strength — sometimes less really is more.

ICEBERG is a Polish nicotine pouch brand from Neoptolem that pushes the boundaries of strength. With options ranging from a moderate 6 mg all the way up to an extreme 40 mg per pouch, ICEBERG is built for experienced users who have outgrown mainstream offerings. Available in slim format, the brand focuses on bold, icy flavours — primarily mint, berry, and fruit combinations that complement the intense nicotine hit. The name says it all: ICEBERG delivers a cold, powerful experience that's not for the faint-hearted. Start with the lower strengths if you're curious, and work up gradually.

ICY WOLF lives up to its name with strong-to-extra-strong slim pouches from 9 mg to 16 mg in fruit and mint flavours. With 6 products focused on cool, icy taste profiles, the brand targets users who want a frosty pouch experience at serious nicotine levels.

Kelly White is a Stockholm-based premium nicotine pouch brand that puts elegance first. Available in both mini and slim formats from nicotine-free up to 8 mg, Kelly White targets users who value subtlety over intensity. The pouches are designed for all-day comfort with a focus on refined flavour — think smooth berry blends and fresh mint rather than candy-shop creations. The can design is deliberately understated, making Kelly White a favourite among professionals who want a discreet, sophisticated nicotine experience. If your priority is quality of craftsmanship over raw power, Kelly White delivers a premium pouch experience.

KLAR (Swedish for "clear") offers exclusively mint-flavoured pouches in both mini and slim formats, from a gentle 3 mg to a solid 9 mg. With 6 products, KLAR is a mint specialist that delivers clean, unambiguous peppermint and spearmint flavours. The mini format option makes KLAR a good discreet choice for mint purists.

Klint is a nicotine pouch brand offering strong-to-ultra-strong options from 8.4 mg to 20 mg in both large and slim formats. With 8 products covering cola, fruit, licorice, and mint, Klint brings unexpected flavour variety to the high-strength segment. The inclusion of large-format pouches sets Klint apart — delivering more material and longer-lasting flavour for users who want a substantial pouch experience.

KUMA offers extra-strong slim pouches at 13.8 mg in fruit and mint flavours. With 4 products, KUMA keeps it tight and powerful — every option delivers a serious nicotine hit with clean, refreshing taste.

LOOP is a Swedish nicotine pouch brand from Another Snus Factory (ASF), launched in 2019 with a clear mission: deliver flavour faster. Their signature "Instant Rush" technology accelerates nicotine release, giving you a quicker, more intense experience from the first moment. Available in mini and slim formats from 0 mg up to 15.6 mg, LOOP covers the full strength spectrum. The flavour range is adventurous — think Jalapeño Lime, Salty Ludicris, and Habanero Mint alongside more traditional mint and berry options. With eco-conscious packaging and a bold visual identity, LOOP appeals to flavour-seekers who want something more exciting than the mainstream brands.

LUMI is a nicotine pouch brand that lives up to its luminous name with bright, vibrant flavour profiles. Available in slim format from 6 mg to 18 mg, LUMI covers the full strength spectrum from normal everyday use to ultra-strong. The flavour range focuses on citrus, fruit, and mint — think zesty lemon, tropical blends, and cool peppermint. With 18 products in the lineup, LUMI offers solid variety at a competitive price point, making it a strong choice for users who want quality flavour without the premium brand price tag.

Lundgrens is a traditional Swedish brand with deep roots in Scandinavian snus culture, now part of British American Tobacco's tobacco-free portfolio. What makes Lundgrens unique is its nature-inspired identity — flavours are often named after Swedish landscapes and regions, evoking the forests, coastlines, and mountains of northern Scandinavia. Available in slim format from 6 mg to 10 mg, Lundgrens delivers a refined, medium-strength experience with flavours like fresh mint, wild berry, and classic licorice. For users who appreciate heritage, craftsmanship, and a connection to the outdoors, Lundgrens brings a sense of place to every pouch.

MAGGIE is a nicotine pouch brand that specialises in ultra-strong fruit and cola flavours. With strengths from 13.6 mg up to a massive 45 mg per pouch, MAGGIE operates in the extreme end of the market. Available in slim format with 12 products focused on cola and fruit flavours, the brand carves a unique niche — tropical fruit and cola combinations at strengths that most brands don't dare to offer. Strictly for experienced users who know their tolerance and want intense, flavourful pouches.

MYNT is a nicotine pouch brand with a clear identity right in the name — mint and freshness are central to everything they do. Available in slim format from 6 mg to 18 mg, MYNT offers a range from everyday normal strength to powerful ultra-strong options. While the lineup does include fruit flavours alongside the signature mint varieties, the brand's strength is in delivering a crisp, cooling experience that mint lovers keep coming back to. With 18 products in the range, MYNT has enough variety to be your daily go-to.

NEAFS is a nicotine pouch brand focused on delivering a clean, tobacco-free experience at serious strengths. Available in slim format from 8 mg to 16 mg, NEAFS sits firmly in the strong-to-extra-strong range with flavours covering berry, fruit, and mint. The brand appeals to users who want reliable, consistent nicotine delivery without the complexity of dozens of flavour variants. NEAFS keeps it simple: strong pouches, honest flavours, no gimmicks.

NOiS is a nicotine pouch brand with a comprehensive strength range from 6 mg normal all the way to 25 mg ultra-strong, available in slim format. With 10 products spanning berry, fruit, and mint flavours across four strength tiers, NOiS gives users the flexibility to match their pouch to their mood. Light day? Grab a 6 mg fruit. Need focus? Reach for the 25 mg mint. Few brands cover as much ground as NOiS within a single, cohesive lineup.

ON! is a nicotine pouch brand from Burger Söhne, backed by Altria — one of the largest tobacco companies in the world. ON! stands out with its exclusively mini format, making it one of the most discreet pouches available. With strengths from 3 mg to 9.3 mg in coffee and mint flavours, ON! targets users who prioritise invisibility and convenience. The tiny pouches are barely noticeable under the lip, perfect for meetings, travel, and social situations.
Pura offers nicotine-free (0 mg) slim pouches in fruit and mint. A clean, simple option for users who enjoy the pouch experience without any nicotine — ideal for tapering or flavour-only enjoyment.

Rabbit is a Lithuanian nicotine pouch brand from Nicobit that operates exclusively in the ultra-strong territory. With a minimum strength of 26 mg and an Extreme Edition hitting 50 mg per pouch, Rabbit is designed for power users who find even "extra strong" options from mainstream brands too mild. Available in slim format with flavours spanning berry, citrus, cola, fruit, and mint, Rabbit combines serious nicotine content with surprisingly enjoyable taste profiles. This is an advanced brand — if you're new to nicotine pouches, start elsewhere and work your way up. For experienced users, Rabbit delivers what others can't.

RAVE is a versatile nicotine pouch brand offering one of the broadest strength ranges on the market — from nicotine-free (0 mg) all the way up to ultra-strong (19.5 mg). Available in slim format with 26 products spanning mint, berry, citrus, cola, and fruit flavours, RAVE gives users the freedom to choose their intensity without switching brands. The range caters to everyone from beginners exploring their first pouch to experienced users seeking a stronger kick. With competitive pricing and consistent quality, RAVE is a solid all-rounder that doesn't force you into a single strength category.

RELX — better known for its vape devices — brings its technology-forward approach to nicotine pouches. Available in slim format from 9 mg to 20 mg across berry, citrus, cola, and mint flavours, RELX pouches target strong-to-ultra-strong users. With 7 products in the range, the brand leverages its existing customer base of nicotine users who want a smoke-free, vapour-free alternative.
Royal White offers a single strong mint slim pouch at 8.3 mg. A focused, no-frills option for mint lovers who want reliable quality at a solid strength level.

RUSH lives up to its name with exclusively high-strength pouches from 11.2 mg to 21 mg ultra-strong. Available in slim format with 9 products covering berry, fruit, and mint, RUSH targets experienced users who want a fast, powerful nicotine experience. The brand skips mild options entirely — every pouch in the range means business.

Siberia is one of the most iconic names in the nicotine pouch world — synonymous with extreme strength and freezing mint. Originally a snus brand from GN Tobacco, Siberia's tobacco-free pouches carry the same reputation for raw power. Available in large, mini, and slim formats with strengths from 16.5 mg to a staggering 49.5 mg, Siberia is built for experienced users who want the most intense nicotine hit available. The flavour is exclusively mint — cold, sharp, and uncompromising. Not for beginners, but legendary among power users.

Skruf is one of Sweden's most respected snus makers, founded in 2002 and now majority-owned by Imperial Brands. With over 300 employees and deep roots in traditional Scandinavian snus culture, Skruf brings decades of manufacturing expertise to its tobacco-free pouch line, Skruf Super White. Available in slim format from 6 mg to 12 mg, Skruf pouches are crafted for users who appreciate quality over novelty. The flavour palette stays refined — fresh mint, ripe berries, and classic licorice — reflecting the brand's Scandinavian heritage. If you're coming from traditional snus and want a cleaner alternative without compromising on feel, Skruf is the natural choice.

Smögen — named after the picturesque fishing village on Sweden's west coast — offers strong slim pouches at 8 mg in berry, licorice, and mint. With 3 products, the brand brings Swedish coastal charm to a focused, quality-first range.

SNOBERG is a nicotine pouch brand offering a focused range of strong (6.5-10 mg) slim pouches in berry, fruit, and mint flavours. With 12 products in the lineup, SNOBERG doesn't try to be everything to everyone — instead, it delivers reliable, well-crafted pouches in the mid-strong range that experienced users reach for day after day. The consistent strength across the range makes it easy to switch flavours without adjusting your nicotine intake.

Snowman is a nicotine pouch brand offering strong-to-extra-strong options in slim format, with strengths from 9 mg to 12 mg. The 12-product lineup covers berry, citrus, fruit, and mint flavours with a focus on cool, refreshing taste profiles. Snowman hits the sweet spot for users who want more punch than mainstream brands but don't need the extreme strengths of brands like CUBA or Rabbit. Consistent, well-flavoured, and competitively priced.

STNG (pronounced "sting") is a nicotine pouch brand offering strong-to-ultra-strong options from 9.2 mg to 27.5 mg. Available in slim format with 10 products covering berry, cola, and mint flavours, STNG delivers a sharp, intense pouch experience that lives up to its name. The brand targets the gap between mainstream strong options and extreme ultra-strong brands — serious enough for experienced users, but not so extreme that flavour gets lost in the nicotine rush.
Swag offers berry-flavoured slim pouches in strong (7.2 mg) and extra-strong (15 mg) variants. A small but focused brand for berry lovers who want options at two distinct strength levels.

TOGO offers a compact range of strong slim pouches from 8 mg to 10 mg in berry, citrus, fruit, and mint. With 4 products, the brand is designed for users who want reliable, mid-strong pouches for everyday carry. Simple, portable, effective.

TYR — named after the Norse god of war — delivers exclusively extra-strong slim pouches at 12 mg in berry, citrus, and mint. With 4 focused products, TYR knows exactly what it is: powerful pouches for users who want a consistent, strong experience without the complexity of multiple strength tiers.

VELO is British American Tobacco's flagship nicotine pouch brand, born from the Scandinavian tradition and now available in over 50 markets worldwide. Originally launched as LYFT and EPOK, the brand was unified under the VELO name in 2019. Manufactured in Pécs, Hungary, VELO uses proprietary nicotine salt technology to deliver a smooth, consistent experience. The range spans from gentle 0 mg options to powerful 17 mg extra-strong variants, available in both slim and mini formats. VELO is known for its crisp, clean flavours — from the signature Mighty Peppermint to vibrant berry and citrus blends. Whether you're new to pouches or switching from cigarettes, VELO offers one of the widest strength and flavour selections on the market.

VID offers a focused range of strong slim pouches from 7.2 mg to 9.6 mg across an impressive 5 flavour categories: berry, coffee, cola, fruit, and mint. With 6 products all in the strong tier, VID keeps strength consistent while maximising flavour variety — ideal for users who know their preferred nicotine level.

White Fox is a focused nicotine pouch brand from GN Tobacco — the makers of Siberia. True to its Nordic heritage, White Fox offers exclusively mint-flavoured pouches in the high-strength bracket, from 12 mg extra-strong to 24 mg ultra-strong. Available in slim format, the brand delivers a clean, icy experience with serious nicotine power. White Fox is the choice for mint purists who want strength without flavour distractions.

White Gold keeps it simple: every product is exactly 6 mg in slim format. With 8 products in citrus, fruit, and mint flavours, the brand lets you focus on taste rather than strength decisions. White Gold is ideal for regular-strength users who've found their sweet spot and just want to explore different flavours at a consistent nicotine level.

X-booster takes a unique approach — all 8 products contain 0 mg nicotine. Instead, the brand focuses on flavour-only slim pouches in coffee and mint varieties. X-booster is perfect for users who enjoy the pouch ritual without wanting nicotine, or for current pouch users tapering their intake to zero. Think of it as the decaf option in the pouch world.

XO takes a refreshingly simple approach to nicotine pouches: every product is exactly 8 mg in slim format. Instead of overwhelming you with strength choices, XO lets you focus purely on flavour — with 10 products spanning berry, citrus, cola, fruit, and mint. This makes XO perfect for users who've found their sweet spot at medium-strong and just want to explore different taste experiences. No guesswork, no accidental upgrades — just consistent 8 mg pouches in whatever flavour suits the moment.

XPCT (expect the unexpected) delivers strong-to-extra-strong slim pouches from 6.5 mg to 10.4 mg. With 6 products covering berry, cola, fruit, and licorice flavours, XPCT stands out by skipping mint entirely — a bold choice that caters to users who want something different from the usual cool-mint dominated market.

XQS (pronounced "excess") is a Swedish nicotine pouch brand that refuses to play it safe with flavour. Originally an independent startup, XQS was acquired by Scandinavian Tobacco Group, giving it access to wider distribution across Europe. Available in slim format from nicotine-free up to 11.2 mg, XQS targets flavour-forward users who want more personality in their pouch. Expect candy-inspired creations like Blueberry Mint, Cactus Sour, and Twin Apple alongside classic cool mint options. The brand has built a loyal following among younger adult consumers who value self-expression and bold taste above all else.

Zeronito is a unique Swedish brand offering exclusively nicotine-free pouches — every product in the range contains 0 mg nicotine. Available in large and slim formats, Zeronito covers an impressive flavour spectrum including mint, berry, coffee, cola, licorice, and fruit varieties. The brand serves two key audiences: people who enjoy the ritual of using a pouch but want to avoid nicotine entirely, and current pouch users looking to gradually reduce their nicotine intake. With 18 products in the lineup, Zeronito proves that you don't need nicotine to enjoy a satisfying pouch experience.

Zeus is a Baltic-made nicotine pouch brand that channels the power of its mythological namesake. Available in slim format with three distinct strength tiers — Medium (4 mg), Strong (8 mg), and an intense Ultra Strong (25 mg) — Zeus covers a wide range from moderate everyday use to seriously powerful experiences. The flavour lineup includes refreshing mint, tangy citrus, tropical fruits, and mixed berries. With bold packaging and a no-nonsense approach to strength, Zeus has quickly built a following among users who want variety and power without paying premium Scandinavian prices.

ZYN is the world's best-selling nicotine pouch brand, created by Swedish Match — a company with over 200 years of Scandinavian tobacco heritage, now part of Philip Morris International. Launched in 2014, ZYN pioneered the modern nicotine pouch category and holds over 60% market share in the United States. Made with pharmaceutical-grade nicotine and available in mini and slim formats, ZYN is renowned for its dry, discreet pouches that sit comfortably under the lip. The lineup covers everything from gentle 1.5 mg minis to bold 16.5 mg extra-strong slims, with flavours ranging from classic Cool Mint and Spearmint to distinctive Violet Licorice and Cucumber Lime. ZYN sets the standard that other brands measure themselves against.
77 Apple Mint Medium 16mg är en vit nikotinpåse med smak av grönt äpple och mint. Produkten kallas även för vitt snus och innehåller 20 portioner.

77 Arctic Berry Medium 16mg VB edition erhåller en styrka av 16 mg nikotin per gram och en smakexplosion av nordiska skogsbär. Ett vitt snus i normalstorlek utan tobak. 77 VB-utgåvan är designad med F1-ikonen Valtteri Bottas i fokus.
Snuset 77 Black Currant Medium 20mg är av sorten vitt och tobaksfritt. Denna prilla har en tydlig smak av svarta vinbär. Produkten innehåller 20 vita portioner.
77 Classic Tobacco Medium är ett vitt tobaksfritt snus med syntetisk smak av tobak. Produkten innehåller 16 milligram nikotin per gram.
77 Cola Cherry Medium är ett vitt snus i smak av körsbär och cola. Nikotinstyrkan i produkten är 16 milligram nikotin per gram.
77 Cola Vanilla 16 mg har en tydlig smak av coladryck i kombination av vanilj. Produkten är av sorten vitt snus vars dosa innehåller 20 vita prillor.
Nikotinprodukten 77 Forest Fruits Medium 16 mg är av sorten vitt snus och innehåller 20 tobaksfria prillor i smak av skogsbär. Formatet på snusprillorna är i slim.
77 Fresh Mint Medium 16 mg är en vit nikotinprodukt i snusformat som innehåller 20 tobaksfria prillor. Smaken Fresh Mint är av mjuk och mild mint.
77 GHOST Mini Bubble Gum Extra Strong
77 Ice Mint Medium Slim är en tobaksfri snus från 77 i slimformat. Dett Vitt snus ger uppfriskande nikotinkickar (16 mg/g) tillsammans med en svalkande smak av isig mint!

77 VB Edition Lakrits & Citrus Medium16 mg är ett vitt snus med en fantastiska kombinationen av lakrits tillsammans med en touch av söt citrus. 77 VB-utgåvan är designad med F1-ikonen Valtteri Bottas i fokus.
77 Peach Mint Medium 16mg kombinerar sötma från persika och friskheten från mint. Produkten är av slaget vitt snus och innehåller 16 mg nikotin per gram.
77 Raspberry Medium 16mg är ett vitt snus fritt från tobak med smak av hallon. Produkten levereras i en snusdosa innehållandes 20 helvita prillor.
77 Strawberry Medium 16mg är ett vitt och tobaksfritt snus innehållandes 20 prillor i smak av jordgubbar. Nikotinhalten i produkten är 20 milligram per gram.
77 Tropical Mint Medium 16mg har en söt smak av tropiska frukter och frisk mint. Denna produkt är ett vitt snus utan tobak. Snusdosan innehåller 20 vita prilor.
77 Watermelon Ice Medium 16mg är en tobaksfri vitt snus av sorten vitt snus. Dosan innehåller 20 helvita portioner med smak av vattemelon och mentol.
ACE Cool Mint Low är ett vitt snus med en mild nikotinhalt på 6 mg/g. Smaksättningen är av frisk mint och dosan innehåller 20 vita prillor.
Prillan ACE Eucalyptus har smak av eucalyptus som är känt för sin friska och fräscha smak.  Produkten är tobaksfria och av sorten vit snus.
ACE Spearmint från Ministry of Snus  har en stark mintsmak och är ett vitt snus-produkt med slim-format. Varje dosa rymmer 20 portioner.

ACE X Black Raspberry Chili, Ministry of Snus presenterar det senaste tillskottet till Ace X-serien, Ace X Black Raspberry Chili. En tobaksfri nikotinpåse med smak av svarta hallon kombinerat med en het twist – nämligen chili. Den kommer i en slim pouch för en perfekt passform under läppen och med en styrka på 16 mg nikotin per gram.
Nikotinprodukten ACE X Cool Mint är av sorten vitt snus med smak av mint. Prillorna är i ett slim format med en nikotinstyrka på 16 mg/g.
ACE X Cosmic Cool Mint är ett tobaksfritt snus vars prillor har en större passform. Smaken är av ren mint och nikotinhalten 16 mg/g.
ACE X Guarana Chili Boost är ett vitt snus i smak av het habanero chili och energidryck. Produkten innehåller 20 vita snusprillor med 16 mg/g nikotin.

Aprés Cola Normal No.4 kommer i normalstora, 100% tobaksfria portioner och dosan är tillverkad av växtbaserat material med smak av cola. Nikotinstyrkan är 8mg/g, vilket klassificerar detta som en normalstark portion.
Après Cola Extra Strong No.4 har en klassisk smak av söt cola. Detta tobaksfria snus innehåller en extra hög nikotinhalt.
Nikotinprodukten Après Ice Tea Peach No.5 är av sorten vitt snus utan tobak. Smaken Ice Tea Peach erbjuder en fruktig smak av persika och svart te.
Après Ice Tea Peach Extra Strong
Après Ice Tea Peach Extra Strong No.5 är ett extra starkt vitt snus i fruktig smak av persikor med ton av svart te. Snuset innehåller 20 prillor.
Après Ice Tea Peach Hyper Strong
Après Lemon Curd No.3 Extra Strong är fritt från tobak vars smak är inspirerat från citronmarmelad. Dosan innehåller 20 vita prillor.
Après Mint No.2 har en tydlig smak av mint med toner av mentol. De tobaksfria portionerna levereras i formatet slim.

Chainpop Apple Cinnamon är ett vitt snus med smak Nypons krispiga sötma med den kryddiga värmen från kanel. Denna harmoniska kombination, förstärkt med en nikotinstyrka på 15mg per gram, är idealisk för dig som letar efter en genuin och balanserad snusupplevelse.

Chainpop Peach & Honey är En unik kombination som andas sommarens fruktträdgårdar och soluppvärmda blommor. Chainpop Peach & Honey erbjuder en härligt mogen smak av söt persika, skickligt sammanvävd med den milda, naturliga sötman från honung, med en nikotinstyrka på 9 mg per påse.

Chainpop Raspberry & Lemon: Tänk dig en sommardag när solen skiner och du längtar efter något uppfriskande. Chainpop har skapat en perfekt balans med detta snus. Söta hallon möter den fräscha känslan av citrus. Varje påse ger dig en fantastisk smakupplevelse och en behaglig nikotinkick på 8.3mg/g.
CUBA Black Banani Hit en unik nikotinpåse i svart färg. Smaken är av banana och nikotinstyrkan på 66 milligram per gram anses extremt stark.
CUBA Black Jogurt är en unik nikotinpåse i svart färg. Smaken är av Svarta vinbär och nikotinstyrkan på 66 milligram per gram anses extremt stark.
Det tobaksfria snuset CUBA Black Blueberry Slim har en söt smak av blåbär. Nikotinhalten i de svartfärgade prillorna är extra hög och varje dosa innehåller 20 st portioner.
CUBA Black Cherry Slim är ett tobaksfritt snus i en intensiv smak av körsbär. Varje dosa innehåller 20 st svartfärgade prillor.
CUBA Black Cola är en svartfärgad nikotinpåse med en särskilt hög nikotinstyrka. Innehåller 43 milligram nikotin per påse i smak av cola.

Detta tobaksfria snus erbjuder en kraftfull och söt smak av mint. Prillorna till CUBA Black Double Fresh är svartfärgade och innehåller en extra hög nikotinhalt. Varje dosa innehåller 20 st prillor i formatet slim.
Denna svartfärgade nikotinpåse CUBA Forest Berries är helt fri från tobak. Nikotinstyrkan på 43 milligram per påse klassificeras som ovanligt stark.
CUBA Black Ice Spearmint är en nikotinpåse i svart färg med en särskilt stark nikotinhalt. Mintsmaken Ice Spearmint kombinerar mentol med grönmynta.
